creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 184395
Update the security/ykpers port to 1.18.0

>Index: security/ykpers/Makefile
>===================================================================
>--- security/ykpers/Makefile	(revision 446007)
>+++ security/ykpers/Makefile	(working copy)
>@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
> # $FreeBSD$
> 
> PORTNAME=	ykpers
>-PORTVERSION=	1.17.1
>+PORTVERSION=	1.18.0
> CATEGORIES=	security
> MASTER_SITES=	http://opensource.yubico.com/yubikey-personalization/releases/
> 
>@@ -12,9 +12,10 @@
> 
> LIB_DEPENDS=	libyubikey.so:security/libyubikey
> 
>+USE_GMAKE=	yes

It is not necessary to set USE_GMAKE because USES=gmake will do so.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/building.html#using-make

> GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
> USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
>-USES=		libtool pathfix pkgconfig
>+USES=		libtool pathfix pkgconfig gmake
> 
> PLIST_FILES=	bin/ykchalresp \
> 		bin/ykinfo \
>Index: security/ykpers/distinfo
>===================================================================
>--- security/ykpers/distinfo	(revision 446007)
>+++ security/ykpers/distinfo	(working copy)
>@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
>-SHA256 (ykpers-1.17.1.tar.gz) = 556baec2bbc94bae01293e64dc3873d68f880119ea5c3772737e4f3dc44f69c4
>-SIZE (ykpers-1.17.1.tar.gz) = 504827
>+TIMESTAMP = 1500201108
>+SHA256 (ykpers-1.18.0.tar.gz) = cf333e133b551adf5963e0f5fe0566f4e397f9784d4c1b8fc56b9d2ebcf982ad
>+SIZE (ykpers-1.18.0.tar.gz) = 518077
